Tarot  ·  Astrology  ·  Intuitive Guidance

Mary
Blue

Intuitive Mystic

Artist, teacher, musician, tarot reader and intuitive mystic. A trusted guide to help you navigate your life path, purpose and the deeper patterns beneath the surface. My readings work with past, present and future planetary alignments and cycles, tarot archetypes, and the natural energy exchange between you and I.

Fire · Wands
Passion, creativity, and transformation. The spark of inspiration that drives action and illuminates your path.
Earth · Pentacles
The material world, abundance, and physical reality. Grounding energy of work, wealth, and the body.
Air · Swords
Mental acuity, truth, and clarity. The sharp mind cutting through illusion to reveal what is real.
Water · Cups
Emotions, intuition, and the inner world. The language of the soul — love, grief, dreams, and depth of feeling.

The Planets

Sun
Rules Leo
Identity, vitality, ego, core self, life force
Moon
Rules Cancer
Emotion, instinct, nurturing, subconscious, home
Mercury
Rules Gemini & Virgo
Communication, mind, logic, learning, exchange
Venus
Rules Taurus & Libra
Love, beauty, values, pleasure, harmony
Mars
Rules Aries & Scorpio
Action, desire, drive, courage, assertion
Jupiter
Rules Sagittarius & Pisces
Expansion, wisdom, fortune, abundance, growth
Saturn
Rules Capricorn & Aquarius
Structure, discipline, time, responsibility, mastery
Neptune
Rules Pisces
Dreams, illusion, transcendence, spirituality, dissolution
Uranus
Rules Aquarius
Revolution, innovation, change, awakening, liberation
Pluto
Rules Scorpio
Power, transformation, rebirth, depth, regeneration
